news.title: SLU Student Wins Soloist Award at ICCA Regional Competition
news.summary_en: Srija Boddu, a sophomore at Saint Louis University, has earned national recognition for her vocal performance at a regional collegiate competition.

news.title: Saint Louis University Receives Grant to Fund Ignatian Colleagues Network
news.summary_en: Saint Louis University has received a $100,000 grant to support an ongoing formation program. The Ignatian Colleagues Network will build on the Ignatian Colleagues Program (ICP) launched in 2023 and provide a next step for those who have completed the intensive two-year mission formation program.
